title: Service Engineer (Electronics Part) - Centre // 5 days
description:
Job Responsibilities

  • Provide on-site technical support, including installation, troubleshooting, and maintenance for equipment such as Laser Processing Machines and PCB Drilling Machines.
  • Deliver prompt, high‑quality technical assistance to customers.
  • Maintain strong customer satisfaction by ensuring timely and effective resolution of service issues.
  • Prepare service reports and carry out required “Contact and Consult” documentation.
  • Keep up to date with new technologies and industry developments to enhance expertise and deliver proactive, flexible support.
  • Perform any other technical or engineering-related tasks assigned by the Management.

Job Requirements

  • Diploma in Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, or a related discipline.
  • Minimum of 3 years’ experience as a service engineer, service technician, or in a similar technical support/maintenance role.
  • Strong technical knowledge of mechanical and/or electronic systems and components.
  • Familiarity with safety protocols and standards for operating machinery and equipment.
  • Excellent diagnostic and problem‑solving skills, with the ability to resolve issues efficiently.
  • Customer‑oriented mindset with strong communication and interpersonal abilities.
  • Able to work independently as well as collaboratively within a team.
  • Good interpersonal skills and capable of explaining technical information clearly and logically.

Interested candidates who wish to apply for the above positions, please click "Apply now" 

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified. 

JAC Recruitment Pte. Ltd.

EA Personnel Name: Wong Yi Lei

postedCompany.description:
JAC is an international recruitment consultancy with over 45 years of specialised recruitment experience across Asia and Europe. We have over 1,200 expert consultants who have a deep cultural understanding of the local markets they operate in. Combined with our regional network and specialised industry focus we are renowned for placing highly skilled permanent and contracting staff into specialist positions.

In Singapore, we cover the Banking and Financial Services, Corporate Services, Digital and Information Technology, Healthcare and Life Sciences, Industrial, Sales & Marketing sectors. We also recruit for contract roles and have a dedicated team that can assist with hiring for Japanese-language skills.

Our job board is updated daily so you can stay updated on jobs as they become available and find the next best role for you.
